supportMessage: Thank you for helping Flag Game stay free, light and available to everyone.
supportThanks: Every contribution helps keep the project simple, fast and made with care for people who want to learn.
aboutIntro: Flag Game was created to help people learn the flags of the 195 countries and strengthen their geography knowledge in a simple and fun way.
freeDescription: The app is free for everyone.
noAdsDescription: The experience was designed without distractions.
independentDescription: Built with a focus on simplicity, learning and maintenance.
geographyLearningDescription: An incentive to recognize countries, continents and cultures.
profileIntro: Your progress is saved only on this device.
profileNote: Architecture prepared for future sync, without login in this version.
achievementsNote: Data is saved locally and already organized for a future online ranking.
privacyIntro: This policy describes how Flag Game handles information in the app.
privacyNoPersonalDataDescription: Flag Game does not request, store or send personal data.
privacyNoLoginDescription: The app has no user account, registration or authentication.
privacyNoTrackingDescription: We do not use cookies, analytics, advertising identifiers or trackers.
privacyLocalRecordsDescription: Records are saved only on the device, using local storage.
privacyOfflineDescription: The main app features remain available without internet.
